name: Farmers State Bank
description_short: West Salem, OH's Farmers State Bank sits at 11 S Main St, offering full-service banking to the local community.
description_long:
Farmers State Bank maintains a branch location at 11 S Main St in West Salem, OH. This standalone banking facility serves the heart of downtown West Salem, providing convenient access to banking services for residents and businesses in the area. The Main Street location in West Salem makes it easily accessible for regular banking visits.

At the West Salem branch, you'll find staff ready to assist with a range of banking needs including deposit accounts, loan services, and financial planning. The 11 S Main St location welcomes walk-in customers during standard business hours. For specific details about services or account options at this West Salem location, call the branch directly.

West Salem, OH residents benefit from having this local Farmers State Bank branch available for their everyday banking. Whether you need to deposit checks, apply for a loan, or discuss financial services, bring your identification and relevant documents. The bank's presence in West Salem demonstrates its commitment to serving the local community.
services: Mobile banking with remote deposit capture
Commercial loans and commercial real estate financing
pros: Over 100 years of operating history and established credibility in Ohio banking market
Six physical branch locations providing in-person access across central/northeastern Ohio
24/7 mobile and online banking with remote deposit capture capabilities
Serves both personal and business customers including agricultural lending segment
Toll-free customer service line (1-800-350-2844) available for account support
Multiple account management options including paperless statements
Flexible loan options for home purchases and business expansion
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to Ohio region with only six branches
Website does not publish competitive rate information or APR ranges for products
About page access blocked (403 error), limiting transparency on company details and leadership
No information provided regarding deposit insurance (FDIC) coverage details
Limited details on specific loan terms, fees, or minimum balance requirements

contact.address: 11 S Main St, West Salem, OH 44287

best_for: Ohio residents seeking community-based banking with local branch access
Small business owners and agricultural customers needing specialized commercial lending
Customers who prefer digital banking convenience with mobile deposit and 24/7 access
Home buyers and property purchasers seeking personalized mortgage solutions
diagnosis: Farmers State Bank is best for Ohio-based consumers and small business owners seeking traditional community banking with local branch access and digital convenience. The main caveat is limited geographic availability (Ohio only) and lack of published rate information, requiring direct contact to compare competitiveness against larger regional or national banks.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
